description_long: This is a thick paperback book with a visually striking, illustrated cover featuring a dynamic science fiction scene. The cover art depicts a futuristic spacecraft or space station set against a swirling blue and white cosmic background, suggesting a dramatic outer space environment. The book's edges are slightly worn, indicating it has been handled or read. The spine is solid and displays the book's title and author in bold, contrasting colors. The back cover contains a block of text and additional artwork, while the pages are tightly bound and appear off-white. The overall appearance is that of a well-produced, mass-market science fiction novel.
description: A thick paperback book with a vivid science fiction illustration on the cover, featuring a spacecraft and cosmic background. The spine and back cover are clearly visible, with bold text and additional artwork.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showcasing a dramatic space-themed illustration with a spacecraft and swirling blue background.
description_view_1: The spine of the book is shown, displaying the title and author in bold text on a blue background.
description_view_2: The top edge and part of the back cover are visible, revealing a block of text and a continuation of the cosmic artwork.
description_view_3: An angled view highlights both the front cover illustration and the spine, emphasizing the book's thickness and vibrant design.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a dynamic, digitally painted scene of a futuristic spacecraft or space station set against a swirling, energetic blue and white cosmic background. The illustration is detailed and action-oriented, evoking a sense of movement and adventure in outer space.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is primarily blue with bold, contrasting text displaying the title and author vertically. There are no visible decorative patterns, but the text is clear and prominent.
